privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating two specific output files: '/home/ga/Documents/ransomware_research_notes.txt' and '/home/ga/Documents/phishing_research_notes.txt'. The agent must also create two bookmark folders exactly named 'Threat Intel - Ransomware' and 'Threat Intel - Phishing'. Furthermore, the verifier explicitly checks the Tor Browser history for the exact strings 'check.torproject.org' (the official Tor check site) and 'duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion' (the official DuckDuckGo v3 onion address).
